title: Call of the Moskstraumen
description:
Gameplay and story event featuring the new awakener Vortice. 
 Obtain SR-Wheel "Imprisoned Madness", Posse "Drowned Innocence" and more.

title: Regional D-Effect Zone
description:
Bi-weekly D-Tide raids. 
 Complete to earn Silver, Black Offerings, Gnosis materials and more. 
 Current Realm relic: Aequor Ring.

title: Curriculum Honor
description:
Complete daily and weekly tasks to earn various rewards. 
 T1: 680 Silver Prime - SSR wheel, 2500 Silver, 12 Luminous Cores and more. 
 T2: 1280 Silver Prime - T1 + Exclusive Avatars, increased daily rewards and more.

title: Wheel Event: Lucky Winner
description:
Limited-time SSR wheel acquisition event. 
 Complete various tasks to obtain 4 copies & 25 Pure Cores. 
 Premium track: Grants +12 copies & 25 Luminous Cores.

title: Skin: Crimson Heartwood
description:
Limited outfit for 24. Includes updated 2d-Sprites. 
 IMPORTANT: REQUIRES 15 DAYS OF LOGIN TO OBTAIN!

title: Pre-order "Conjugated Fates"
description:
Arachne preorder mission track. 
30 Luminous Cores, 20k Silver, 1 Prototype Horizon, 1 Timeloop. 
 Purchase before April 20th to obtain an exclusive avatar.

title: Gifts from Mythag
description: 28-day login rewards: 10 Luminous Cores, Rose Scrips and Investigation Badges.

title: Feast of Flames
description:
Gameplay and story event featuring Wanda. 
 Obtain SR-Wheel "The Gaze of Isarawu" and more.

title: Phase Reversal
description: PVP Traphase event. Participate in PVP matches to earn rewards including Posse "Tavern's Opening", emotes, silver, upgrade materials and more.

title: The Sovereign's Return
description:
Gameplay and story event featuring Tulu. 
 Obtain limited SR-Wheel "Blue Stone Throne", limited avatar "By the Silver Key: Tulu" and more.

title: Gifts from Mythag
description: Login rewards: 10 Luminous Cores for 7 cumulative logins. Additional rewards available through up to 14 cumulative logins.

title: Curriculum Honor
description:
Complete daily and weekly tasks to earn various rewards. 
 T1: 680 Silver Prime - SSR wheel, 2500 Silver, 12 Luminous Cores and more. 
 T2: 1280 Silver Prime - T1 + Exclusive Avatars, increased daily rewards and more.

title: With Spikenard And Myrrh
description: Complete tasks to unlock the "With Spikenard And Myrrh" skin for Wanda, along with 10 Pure Cores.

title: Bound Weaver
description:
Gameplay event featuring the new awakener Arachne. 
 Obtain limited avatar, SR-Wheel "Rota Fortunae", Seals/Scrips and more.

title: WoD Archives: L'Heure du Thé
description:
Limited-time WoD wheel acquisition event featuring "Private Afternoon".
 Complete various tasks to obtain 4 copies & 25 Pure Cores. 
 Premium track: Grants +12 copies & 25 Luminous Cores.

title: The Great Conquering
description:
Gameplay event featuring Agrippa and Uvhash.
 Earn Scrips, Aetheric Shards, Dreamshards, Mimetic Crystals and more.

title: To the Stars
description:
2.5th Anniversary commemorative login event.
 Log in daily to claim up to 16 copies of the limited SSR Wheel "To the Stars".

title: Dreamy Rendezvous
description:
2.5th Anniversary mission event. 
 Complete tasks to claim Awakener "Saya" and 250 Ethereal Cores.
 Premium Archives: Additional 250 Ethereal Cores, Gnosis Primers, 1 Rebirth Core and more.

title: Meowch Obliged!
description:
Capture Dimensional Black Cats across 7 Astral Reign boss stages.
 Entry closes June 15; active runs last until at least June 29 and may extend if global capture goals are still unfinished.
 Rewards include 10k Silver, Formless Ones' Invitations and Gnosis materials.

title: WoD Archives: Blossom Court
description:
Limited-time WoD wheel acquisition event featuring "Sakura Reveries". 
 Complete various tasks to obtain 4 copies & 25 Pure Cores. 
 Premium track: Grants +12 copies & 25 Luminous Cores.

title: New Arrivals Gift Boxes
description:
Limited avatar gift boxes: "Ode in Embers" and "Celestial Accord".
 Each avatar box includes 10 Formless Ones' Invitations, 1 Prototype Horizon and 1 Timeloop Copy for 1280 Silver Prime.
 Selected bundles "Summer Fireworks" and "Summer Matsuri" are also available during the listing period.

title: Dreamy Offering
description:
Special Awakening mission event. 
 Complete 1000 Awakens during the event to claim up to 1000 Dreamsparks.

title: Gifts from Mythag
description: Season 33 login rewards: 10 Luminous Cores for 7 cumulative logins, with additional cumulative login rewards.

title: Curriculum Honor
description: Season 33 Curriculum rewards include limited avatars for Saya, Doll: Inferno and Caecus, plus Traphase emotes for Nautila, Goliath and Karen.

title: Pre-order "Unfading Memories"
description:
Pre-order Chronicle "Unfading Memories" mission track.
 30 Luminous Cores, 20k Silver, 1 Prototype Horizon, 1 Timeloop Copy, Dreamsparks and Dreamshards.
 Purchase before May 30th to obtain the "Bon Appetite" avatar and 10 Formless Ones' Invitations.

title: Stream of Infatuation
description:
Limited-time Silver Prime reward event. 
 Spend up to 30k Silver Prime to claim the "Sprout of Love" avatar frame, Astral Reign Awakener and WoD selectors.

title: Ouvertüre Universell
description:
Complete tasks to unlock the "Ouvertüre Universell" skin for Hameln for free.
 After the event ends, "Hameln: Ouvertüre Universell" will be available in Garment Ordering for 680 Silver Prime.

title: Gifts from Mythag
description: Season 34 login rewards: 10 Luminous Cores for 7 cumulative logins, with additional cumulative login rewards.

title: Curriculum Honor
description: Season 34 Curriculum rewards include limited avatars for Thais, Pharos and Ryker, plus Traphase emotes for Uvhash, Aurita and Jenkin. The shorter season has doubled EXP and reduced Silver Prime costs for direct Premium Topic activation and upgrades.

title: Invisible Symphony
description:
Gameplay and story event rerun featuring Hameln. 
 Obtain SR-Wheel "Never-Ending Performance", limited avatar "By the Silver Key: Hameln", Rose Scrips and more.

title: Inverted Rebirth
description:
Gameplay event featuring the limited collab awakener Saya. 
 Obtain SR-Wheel "Muddied Fairy Tale", limited avatar "By the Silver Key: Saya", Scrips, Dreamsparks and more.
